titleStmt.title: SII 25.73: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 73. (A.R. No. 73 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

The characters of this epigraph may be assigned to c. 13th Century and hence, the king may be identified with Kulōttuṅga III. The other details of date viz., Wednesday and Puṉarpūsam are not sufficient for verification.

It records the grant of lands in the village Siviṟi in the Viḍīlpaṟṟu along with its income from taxes (named) to meet the expenses of worship and the repairs in the temple of god Kaṟaikkaṇṭhīśuram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Viḍāl in Viḍāṟpaṟṟu alias Vikramapāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by the nāṭṭavar of Teḷḷāṟṟup-paṟṟu of the same nāḍu. It refers to Toṇḍaimaṇḍala-brahmārāyaṉ as a signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ ci kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 27m putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇar pūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak
koṭṭattu viṭāṟpaṟṟāṉa vikkirama pāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu viṭālil Uṭaiyār kaṟaikkaṇṭicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Iṉṉāṭṭut teḷḷāṟṟupaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Iṉṉāyaṉārkkup pūcaikkum tiruppaṇi
kkum Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭil civiṟi tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ivūr nāṟpāṟkellaikkum Uṭppaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey māvaṭai kuḷavaṭai puṟavaṭai Erivāy puṟavaṭai nattantaricu kaḷartiṭar taṟiyiṟai taṭṭā
rappāṭṭam cekkiṟai kācāyavaṟkam maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa tirunāmattukkāṇiyiṟaiyili yākat tantu Ippaṭikku candrātittavaraiyum cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Ivūr nāṉkellaiyi
lun tiruccūla stāpaṉamum paṇṇit tantom teḷḷāṟṟup paṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl Ivai toṇṭaimaṇṭalap piramarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
